subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! In craftsmanship, exert all possible care, that thy work may attain the utmost refinement and perfection [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق در صنعت تا توانی دقت نما تا در نهایت لطافت و اتقان رسد چه که کمال
subcodes.subjects: @work as worship, @excellence; distinction, @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession
